title: 天皇賞（秋）の後に・霹靂に刃向かいて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
During the race, Mejiro Ardan surpasses her limits
and seizes a spectacular victory. While
exchanging compliments with Tamamo Cross and
Oguri cap afterwards, she comes to a realization.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She has many rivals who will push her to run with
every ounce of her being, and that as long as they
exist, her potential for growth will remain
limitless.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This epiphany leaves her unable to contain her
excitement for our next goal.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Around this time, Sakura Chiyono O watches the
autumn Tenno Sho on TV and sees Mejiro Ardan's
growth as a racer with her own eyes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan begins her preparation for the
Osaka Hai. She remains entirely oblivious,
however, to the shadow now cast over Sakura
Chiyono O's face...
